LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ROSITA GOBBELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS THAT MS. GOBBELL ENTRUSTED THE VEHICLE TO MR. GOBBELL WITH KNOWLEDGE OF HIS HISTORY OF DRUNK DRIVING, HIS LACK OF A LICENSE, AND THAT HE POSED A HAZARD TO PEOPLE ON THE ROAD SUPPORT THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 =302/MJM

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JASON GOBBELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGATIONS THAT MR. GOBBELL WAS DRIVING DRUNK, WITHOUT A LICENSE, AND HAD A PRIOR DUI ARREST SUPPORT THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR # 11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JUDITH WOLFF OF THE WINER & MCKENNA, LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 433-1000 EXT. 125 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. CATHERINE A. WALSH, TEL. NO. (925) 825-9500 EXT. 811 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GOBBELL BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ROSITA GOBBELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiff's allegations that Ms. Gobbell entrusted the vehicle to Mr. Gobbell with knowledge of his history of drunk driving, his lack of a license, and that he posed a hazard to people on the road support the prayer for punitive damages. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/mjm

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JUDITH WOLFF OF THE WINER & MCKENNA, LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 433-1000 EXT. 125 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS JASON GOBBELL & ROSTIA GOBBELL ET. AL. BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. CATHERINE A. WALSH, TEL. NO. (925) 825-9500 EXT. 811 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GOBBELL BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT JASON GOBBELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE REQUEST FOR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiff's allegations that Mr. Gobbell was driving drunk, without a license, and had a prior DUI arrest support the claim for punitive damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Continued To Aug-05-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT ROSITA GOBBELL'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to August 5, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 29, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
